title: Analyse des logs de sécurité Windows

course.content:
**La table `SecurityEvent` est la plus importante pour l'investigation Windows dans Sentinel :**

```kql
// ─── Vue d'ensemble des EventIDs ───
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize Count=count() by EventID
| order by Count desc
| take 20

// ─── Connexions réussies (4624) ───
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where EventID == 4624
| where LogonType in (2, 3, 10)  // Interactif, Réseau, RemoteInteractif
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, IpAddress, LogonType
| order by TimeGenerated desc

// ─── Map des types de logon ───
// LogonType 2  : Interactif (console)
// LogonType 3  : Réseau (SMB, net use)
// LogonType 4  : Batch (tâche planifiée)
// LogonType 5  : Service
// LogonType 10 : Remote Interactive (RDP)
// LogonType 11 : Cached credentials

// ─── Échecs de connexion avec détails ───
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where EventID == 4625
| project 
    TimeGenerated, 
    Computer, 
    Account, 
    IpAddress,
    LogonType,
    Status,        // Code d'erreur NTSTATUS
    SubStatus      // Sous-code (ex: 0xC000006A = mauvais mot de passe)
| extend RaisonEchec = case(
    SubStatus == "0xC000006A", "Mauvais mot de passe",
    SubStatus == "0xC0000064", "Compte inexistant",
    SubStatus == "0xC000006F", "Hors plage horaire",
    SubStatus == "0xC0000234", "Compte verrouillé",
    strcat("Code: ", SubStatus)
)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
```

course.section: Détection de brute force et compromission
course.content:
```kql
// ─── Détection brute force Windows ───
let SeuillBF = 10;
let Fenetre = 30m;

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where EventID == 4625
| summarize 
    FailCount = count(),
    Accounts = make_set(Account),
    FirstAttempt = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastAttempt = max(TimeGenerated)
    by IpAddress, Computer
| where FailCount >= SeuillBF
| extend DuranceSec = datetime_diff('second', LastAttempt, FirstAttempt)
| extend PerMinute = round(60.0 * FailCount / max_of(DuranceSec, 1), 1)
| project Computer, IpAddress, FailCount, PerMinute, Accounts, FirstAttempt, LastAttempt
| sort by FailCount desc

// ─── Compromission : echecs + succès ───
let IPsSuspectes = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
    | where EventID == 4625
    | summarize Fails=count() by IpAddress
    | where Fails >= 5
    | project IpAddress;

SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where EventID == 4624
| where IpAddress in (IPsSuspectes)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, IpAddress, LogonType
| extend Alerte = "COMPROMISSION_PROBABLE"
| sort by TimeGenerated desc

// ─── Impossible Travel — Azure AD ───
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| extend Country = tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion)
| summarize Countries = make_set(Country), Connections = count() by UserPrincipalName
| where array_length(Countries) > 1
| extend Alerte = "IMPOSSIBLE_TRAVEL"
```

```kql
// ─── Création de comptes (4720) ───
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4720
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, SubjectUserName, TargetUserName
| extend Alerte = "NOUVEAU_COMPTE"
| order by TimeGenerated desc

// ─── Ajout au groupe Administrateurs (4732) ───
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4732
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, SubjectUserName, TargetUserName, GroupName
| where GroupName has_any ("Administrators", "Domain Admins", "Enterprise Admins")
| extend Alerte = "PRIVILEGE_ESCALATION"

// ─── Effacement des logs (1102) ───
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 1102
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, SubjectUserName
| extend Alerte = "LOG_CLEARED"

// ─── Nouvelles connexions RDP depuis l'extérieur ───
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where EventID == 4624
| where LogonType == 10  // Remote Interactive
| where IpAddress !startswith "10." 
    and IpAddress !startswith "192.168."
    and IpAddress !startswith "172."
    and IpAddress != "-"
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, IpAddress
| extend Alerte = "RDP_EXTERNE"
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
```

```kql
// Nécessite : Audit Process Creation + Command Line Logging

// ─── Processus PowerShell suspects ───
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(4h)
| where EventID == 4688
| where NewProcessName has "powershell"
| extend CmdLine = CommandLine
| where CmdLine has_any ("-enc", "-EncodedCommand", "downloadstring", "iex", "invoke-expression", "bypass")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ParentProcessName, NewProcessName, CmdLine
| extend Alerte = "PS_SUSPECT"

// ─── LOLBins suspects (Living off the Land) ───
let LOLBins = dynamic(["certutil.exe", "mshta.exe", "wscript.exe", 
                        "regsvr32.exe", "rundll32.exe", "bitsadmin.exe",
                        "cmstp.exe", "msiexec.exe"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(4h)
| where EventID == 4688
| where NewProcessName has_any (LOLBins)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, NewProcessName, CommandLine

// ─── Process injection (enfant suspect d'Office) ───
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(4h)
| where EventID == 4688
| where ParentProcessName has_any ("winword.exe", "excel.exe", "outlook.exe")
| where NewProcessName has_any ("powershell.exe", "cmd.exe", "wscript.exe", "mshta.exe")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ParentProcessName, NewProcessName, CommandLine
| extend Alerte = "PROCESS_INJECTION"

// ─── Logs PowerShell Operational ───
// Microsoft-Windows-PowerShell/Operational dans Sentinel
Event
| where EventLog == "Microsoft-Windows-PowerShell/Operational"
| where EventID == 4104  // Script Block
| where RenderedDescription has_any ("Invoke-Mimikatz", "Invoke-BloodHound", "Get-GPPPassword")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, RenderedDescription
```

exercises.title: Brute force — seuil adaptatif
exercises.instructions:
Détectez les tentatives de brute force dans `SecurityEvent` (EventID 4625) sur les **6 dernières heures**.

Une IP est suspecte si elle dépasse **10 tentatives**. Affichez l'IP, le nombre de tentatives, et la liste des comptes ciblés (`make_set(Account)`).
exercises.correction:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(6h)
| where EventID == 4625
| summarize Attempts = count(), Accounts = make_set(Account) by IpAddress
| where Attempts > 10
| sort by Attempts desc
exercises.explanation: Réduire la fenêtre à 6h augmente la sensibilité : un brute force moderne est rapide. Combiner le compte de tentatives avec la liste de comptes ciblés permet de distinguer brute force (1 compte) du password spraying (N comptes).

exercises.title: Connexions hors horaires de bureau
exercises.instructions:
Les connexions Windows réussies (EventID **4624**) **avant 7h ou après 20h** sont suspectes.

Utilisez `hourofday(TimeGenerated)` pour extraire l'heure, filtrez hors de la plage 7-20h, sur les dernières 24h.

Affiche : `TimeGenerated`, `Account`, `Computer`, `IpAddress`
exercises.correction:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where EventID == 4624
| extend Hour = hourofday(TimeGenerated)
| where Hour < 7 or Hour > 20
| project TimeGenerated, Account, Computer, IpAddress, Hour
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
exercises.explanation: `hourofday()` retourne l'heure (0-23) d'un timestamp. Les connexions légitimes effectuées à des heures inhabituelles sont souvent le signe d'un compte compromis utilisé depuis un fuseau horaire différent.

exercises.title: Créations de comptes suspectes (EventID 4720)
exercises.instructions:
L'EventID **4720** correspond à la **création d'un compte Windows**. Trouvez les créations sur les **7 derniers jours** et groupez-les par l'administrateur qui les a créées (`SubjectUserName`).

Affichez : qui a créé (`SubjectUserName`), les comptes créés (`make_set(TargetUserName)`), et le nombre total.
exercises.correction:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4720
| summarize CreatedAccounts = make_set(TargetUserName), Count = count() by SubjectUserName
| sort by Count desc
exercises.explanation: EventID 4720 est un indicateur de **persistance** critique : un attaquant qui crée un compte admin se garantit un accès durable même si son accès initial est révoqué. `SubjectUserName` identifie l'auteur de la création.
